description_long: This object consists of four industrial-style barrels, three standing upright and one lying on its side, with a large black liquid spill adjacent to the horizontal barrel. The barrels are colored yellow, blue, and red, each featuring dark metal hoops for structural reinforcement. The tops of the upright barrels have small circular openings, typical of oil or chemical drums, and the surfaces appear metallic with a matte finish. The black spill suggests the barrels may contain oil or another viscous liquid, adding to the industrial and hazardous context. No visible handles or labeling are present, and the barrels are grouped closely together, as often seen in storage yards or construction sites. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or warehouse environments.
description: A group of four industrial barrels in yellow, blue, and red, with metal hoops and a large black liquid spill beside one barrel. The barrels have a rugged, metallic look and are typical of storage or hazardous material sites.
description_view_0: Three upright barrels and one yellow barrel lying on its side with a large black spill in the foreground.
description_view_1: The yellow barrel on its side is prominent, showing its circular end and the black spill spreading out in front.
description_view_2: The tops of the upright barrels are visible, highlighting the small openings and the proximity of the black spill.
description_view_3: The blue and red barrels are most visible, with the yellow barrel on its side partially obscured and the spill mostly hidden.
